preloadTrial.messageText: Por favor, espera mientras se carga el juego. Esto puede tardar unos minutos.

fullScreenTrial.prompt: Cambiando a modo de pantalla completa.

navigation.text1: To go through the activity, use the arrows that appear on the screen.

fluency-arf.text1: En esta actividad vas a hacer actividades de matemáticas. Empezarás con sumas y restas.
fluency-arf.text2: Resuelve estos problemas en tu cabeza SIN utilizar lápiz ni papel.

fluency-calf.text1: En esta actividad vas a hacer actividades de matemáticas. Empezarás con sumas y restas.
fluency-calf.text2: Algunos números son grandes, así que te sugerimos usar lápiz y papel para resolverlos.

core-math.text2: In this activity, you will solve different kinds of math problems.
core-math.text3: You may see problems that are new to you. Do your best and try to answer as many problems as you can.

K2.text2: I'm Ally the Alpaca. Can you help me get back home?
K2.text3: My house is at the top of a mountain. To get up the mountain we need to solve some math problems.

fluency.text2: Utiliza las teclas con números que están en la parte superior del teclado para escribir tu respuesta.
fluency.text3: Intentémoslo, presiona cualquier tecla con números en la parte superior del teclado.
fluency.text4: Presiona la tecla 'Enter/Entrar' para guardar tu respuesta y pasar al siguiente problema.
fluency.text6: Si quieres cambiar tu respuesta antes de guardarla, presiona la tecla 'Borrar/Delete' para cambiar lo que escribiste.
fluency.text8: Si la respuesta tiene dos números, por ejemplo el número 10; primero presiona el 1 y después el 0 para formar el número 10.
fluency.text9: ¡Intentémoslo! Escribe el número 10 en el cuadro de texto y luego presiona la tecla 'Enter/Entrar' para continuar.
fluency.text11: Esa no es la tecla correcta. Por favor, inténtalo de nuevo.
fluency.text12: Eso no es del todo correcto. Por favor, inténtalo de nuevo.
fluency.text14: Ten en cuenta que si no sabes la respuesta, puedes pasar al siguiente problema presionando la tecla 'Enter/Entrar'.
fluency.fluency-arf: Recuerda resolver estos problemas en tu cabeza SIN utilizar lápiz ni papel.
fluency.fluency-calf-YeatmanLab: Recuerda tener lápiz y papel para ayudarte a resolver los problemas.
fluency.fluency-calf-numberLab: Remember to have pencil and paper ready to help you solve the problems. Please do NOT use a calculator.
fluency.text16: Presiona CUALQUIER TECLA para empezar los problemas de práctica.
fluency.text17: If you don't know the answer, you can skip the problem by pressing the 'Submit' button.
fluency.text20: Use the mouse to select your answer.
fluency.text21: Use your finger to select your answer.

core-math.text3: Use the number keys at the top of your keyboard.
core-math.text4: Press 'Enter' or 'Return' to save your answer and go to the next problem.
core-math.text5: If you want to change your answer before submitting, press 'Backspace' or 'Delete' to undo what you typed.
core-math.text6: If you need to hear the question again, press the speaker icon at the top of your screen.
core-math.text8: If you are working on one problem for a while, you may see a time warning in the corner of your screen.
core-math.text9: When time is up, you will hear a sound and get a new problem.
core-math.text10-YeatmanLab: Keep pencil and paper ready in case you need them.
core-math.text10-numberLab: Keep pencil and paper ready in case you need them. Please do NOT use a calculator.
core-math.text11: Ally will take some breaks along the way. If you need a break, you can take one when Ally stops to rest.
core-math.text12: There will be breaks during the activity. During the breaks, you can take as much time as you need.
core-math.text13: Press the arrow when you're ready to begin.
core-math.text14: Let's try it! Type the number 10 into the textbox and then press 'Enter' or 'Return' to submit your answer.
core-math.text15: Use the arrow keys or mouse to switch between response boxes. Press 'Enter' or 'Return', or click the arrow when you're finished and ready to continue.
core-math.text16: That's not quite right. If you're stuck, look at the image for help.
core-math.text17: Use the keyboard that is shown on the screen to type in your answer.
core-math.text18: Press the green 'Submit' button to save your answer and go to the next problem.
core-math.text19: If you want to change your answer before submitting, press the red 'Delete' button.
core-math.text20: Let's try it! Type the number 10 into the textbox and then press the 'Submit' button.
core-math.text21: You can switch to the other response box by tapping on it. Press the 'Submit' button when you're finished and ready to continue.

practice.feedbackIncorrect1: Eso no es del todo correcto.
practice.feedbackIncorrect4: Por favor, escribe {{target}} en el recuadro y luego presiona la tecla 'Enter/Entrar' para continuar.
practice.feedbackIncorrect6: Please type {{target}} into the textbox and then press the 'Submit' button.

postPractice.text3: Poner mucha atención a los cambios de signo.
postPractice.text4: Si no estás seguro(a) puedes pasar al siguiente ejercicio presionando 'Enter/Entrar'.
postPractice.fluency-arf: Ahora estás listo(a) para resolver problemas por tu cuenta.
postPractice.fluency-calf-YeatmanLab: Ahora estás listo(a) para resolver problemas por tu cuenta. Recuerda que para esta segunda actividad puedes utilizar lápiz y papel.
postPractice.fluency-calf-numberLab: You are now ready to solve problems on your own. If you haven't gotten a pencil and paper yet, take this moment to grab them. Please do NOT use a calculator.
postPractice.text6: Tendrás {{time}} minutos para resolver tantos problemas como puedas.
postPractice.text7: Trabaja lo mas rápido que puedas sin cometer errores.
postPractice.text10: If you're not sure that's okay, just try your best!
postPractice.text11: You will have 30 seconds to answer as many as you can.
postPractice.text12: You can skip if you're not sure by pressing the 'Submit' button.

warning: WARNING: One of the response boxes is empty. Press the Enter key if you wish to submit this response.
warning-mobile: WARNING: One of the response boxes is empty. Press 'Submit' if you wish to submit this response.
warning-number-line: You need to move the marker! Take your best guess!

intro.text1: Welcome to the math fluency activity!
intro.text2: In this activity, you will be doing math problems involving addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
intro.text4: For this activity, you will be using the {{mode}}.
intro.text7: In this activity, you will be doing math problems. You will solve the first set of problems by {{mode}}.
intro.text8: In this activity, you will be doing math problems.
intro.text9: typing your answers on the keyboard
intro.text10: clicking on your answer with the mouse
intro.text11: tapping your answer with your finger

instructions.text2: You will answer problems in <u>three</u> different ways.
instructions.text3: Before we solve any math problems, let's practice each way of answering!
instructions.text4: Choices will appear below the math problem. Use the mouse to select your answer.
instructions.text5:
You will have {{time}} minutes to answer as many problems as you can.

Work as fast as you can, and try not to make mistakes.

Good luck!
instructions.text6: We're first going to practice with the keyboard.
instructions.text7: We're first going to practice {{mode}} when there are two choices.
instructions.text8: We're first going to practice {{mode}} when there are six choices.

practice.text2: Use your {{mode}} the button that matches the number.
practice.text5: A number will be shown on the screen. Use the keyboard to type that number into the textbox.
practice.text6: You will have 30 seconds to answer as many as you can. Work as fast as you can, and try not to make mistakes. {{continue}}
practice.text7: A number will be shown on the screen. Type that number into the textbox using the number keys at the top of your keyboard.
practice.text8: Press "Enter" or "Return" to save your answer and go to the next practice item.

endScreen.text1:
We will now start the math activities. You will be doing four activities, one after the other.

If you haven't gotten a pencil and paper yet, take this moment to grab them. Please do NOT use a calculator.
endScreen.text2: You are done with the first activity. You will now start the second activity.
endScreen.text3: You are done with the second activity. You will now start the third activity.
endScreen.text4: You are done with the third activity. You will now start the last activity.
endScreen.text6: Let's now solve some math problems.
endScreen.text7: For the first set of problems, {{mode}}.
endScreen.text9: You are all done with the first set of problems. For the second set of problems, {{mode}}.
endScreen.text10: use the keyboard to type your answers
endScreen.text11: use the mouse to click on your answers
endScreen.text12: use your finger to tap on your answers

intro.text2: In this activity, you will be doing math problems.
intro.text3: But first, let's play a quick numbers game!
intro.text4: You did great on that numbers game!
intro.text5: Let's do some math problems now. You will start with addition and subtraction.
intro.text6: Solve these problems in your head WITHOUT using pencil or paper.

instructions.text1: You will see two numbers. You task is to choose the greater number.
instructions.text1K: You will see two numbers. Your task is to choose the bigger number.

practice.incorrect:
The correct answer is {{target}}.
{{target}} is greater than {{distractor}}. Click the {{target}}.
practice.incorrectK:
The correct answer is {{target}}.
{{target}} is bigger than {{distractor}}. Click the {{target}}.

postPractice.text1: Let's do it for real now.
postPractice.text2: Try your best and go as fast as you can!

transition.K2-text2: But there are some big rocks in the way.
transition.K2-text3:
To climb over the rocks, you need to help Ally put numbers on a number line.

Press the arrow to practice!
transition.K2-text5:
You'll see a number that Ally needs to put on the line. Move the marker to where you think the number should go.

Then, press the arrow to keep going.
transition.K2-text6: Let's help Ally put numbers on this number line.
transition.text2: Now we're going to do some questions with number lines.
transition.text3: Your task is to decide where on the number line some numbers are.
transition.text6:
You'll see a number. Move the marker to where you think the number should go.

Then, press the arrow to save your answer and go to the next question.
transition.text8: Let's mark some fractions on this number line.

numberLine.text1: This is a number line that goes from 0 to {{number}}.
numberLine.text2: Great job! Now the number line goes from 0 to {{number}}.
numberLine.text3: The black dot is called a marker. Right now the marker is at 0.
numberLine.text4: Right now the marker is at 0.
numberLine.text6: Try to move the marker to {{number}}.
numberLine.text7: Click and drag the marker to move it. You can also click on the line.
numberLine.text8: Press the arrow when you're done!
numberLine.text9: On this number line, 1 is here.

break0.K2-text2: Ally is taking a break to eat some apples. Press the arrow when you're read to keep going.

break1.K2-text2: You've crossed the valley and started climbing the mountain. Let Ally have a little break, then press the arrow to keep going.

break2.K2-text2: Ally is getting tired. Take a break if you need one, then press the arrow to keep going.

break3.K2-text2: You're almost at the top of the mountain. Take a little break, then press the arrow to keep going.

core-math.text1: Take a break if you need one.
core-math.text2: Press the arrow when you're ready to continue.

endScreen.text3: Presiona CUALQUIER TECLA para guardar tu trabajo y salir.
endScreen.text6: Thank you so much for helping Ally get back home.
endScreen.text7: Press the arrow to save your work and exit.
